title: The Ultimate Wedding Planning Checklist for Brides
description: Just got engaged and not sure where to start? This wedding planning checklist breaks the whole thing into bite-sized steps, from 12 months out to the week of the wedding. Save it so nothing slips through the cracks, then grab the full printable planner to keep every detail in one place.
altText: A cream wedding planning checklist infographic with elegant serif text, organized by time before the wedding from 12 months down to one week.
pendingBeforePost: swap Gumroad link for real offer URL
